channel.title: Projects on My Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on My Portfolio

item.title: Acquire Game
item.description:
PROJECT 1

Developed an automated Acquire board game, simulating hotel chain buying, selling, and merging, using game trees to select optimal moves based on predefined strategies.

Automated integration testing by scripting JSON input/output comparisons and ensuring code quality with Pytest unit tests.

Code available upon requst

item.title: Early-Onset Parkinson Detection from Speech Data
item.description:
PROJECT 2

Collaborated with an Indian hospital to develop a prototype for classifying early-onset Parkinson’s using speech data

Conducted a literature review to identify key features and libraries, and designed a deep learning model for on-site speech analysis, ensuring data privacy.

item.title: Computer Networks
item.description:
Collaborated with an Indian hospital to develop a prototype for classifying early-onset Parkinson’s using speech data

Conducted a literature review to identify key features and libraries, and designed a deep learning model for on-site speech analysis, ensuring data privacy.

Collaborated with an Indian hospital to develop a prototype for classifying early-onset Parkinson’s using speech data

Conducted a literature review to identify key features and libraries, and designed a deep learning model for on-site speech analysis, ensuring data privacy.

item.title: Parts of Speech Tagging with Hidden Markov Models (HMM) and Viterbi Algorithm
item.description:
Collaborated with an Indian hospital to develop a prototype for classifying early-onset Parkinson’s using speech data

Conducted a literature review to identify key features and libraries, and designed a deep learning model for on-site speech analysis, ensuring data privacy.
